title: platostoma elongatum
intro: Platostoma elongatum, also known as African Blue Basil, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Platostoma elongatum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
